name: E2E: every tool in the manifest is wired into the runner and obeys the missing-tool policy (required-absent hard-fails, optional-absent degrades)
command: TD="$(mktemp -d)"; printf 'x\n' > "$TD/f.txt"; n=0; fail=0; for t in $(node -e 'const m=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8"));process.stdout.write(m.tools.map(x=>x.tool).join("\n"))' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/toolchain.json"); do n=$((n+1)); RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool "$t" --file "$TD/f.txt" --json >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; o=$?; RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool "$t" --file "$TD/f.txt" --required --json >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; r=$?; [ "$o" -ne 3 ] && fail=$((fail+1)); [ "$r" -ne 1 ] && fail=$((fail+1)); done; rm -rf "$TD"; [ "$n" -ge 80 ] && [ "$fail" -eq 0 ] && echo every-tool-policy-wired 1>&2
